_comment: דוגמאות MCP (user-supabase). production = strategy-vault-production; personal_dev = פרויקט אישי.

production.note: הרץ מיגרציות ו-SQL רגיש רק אחרי אישור — זה ה-DB החי.

personal_dev.note: מתאים לניסויים; אותן דוגמאות עם project_id אחר.

shared_queries.report_strategies_metrics_files:
select
  s.id,
  s.name,
  s.status,
  s.market,
  s.instrument,
  s.timeframe,
  s.direction,
  s.created_at,
  m.win_rate,
  m.total_trades,
  m.net_profit,
  m.max_drawdown,
  m.profit_factor,
  (select count(*)::int from public.strategy_files f where f.strategy_id = s.id) as file_count
from public.strategies s
left join public.strategy_metrics m on m.strategy_id = s.id
order by s.updated_at desc
limit 50;
shared_queries.migration_strategy_files_index:
create index if not exists strategy_files_strategy_created_idx
  on public.strategy_files (strategy_id, created_at desc);
